title: nepeta agrestis
intro: Nepeta agrestis, also known as wood betony or field balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and calm nervous tension. The health benefits of Nepeta agrestis include its potential to alleviate headaches, improve sleep quality, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote relaxation and well-being.
